# Images

Place your images here:

- `profile.jpg` — Your profile photo (used in Hero section)
- `microsense-cover.png` — Microsense project cover image
- `ima-approval.png` — IMA admin bulk approval UI screenshot
- `ima-listview.png` — IMA admin list view screenshot
- `ima-profilecard.png` — IMA profile card layout screenshot

These files are referenced by the portfolio components.
If an image is missing, components will gracefully hide the broken image.
